summary: Latency-sensitive first-finish testing for Kiran Traders. Verified backend (settings, categories, products, product detail, admin auth, order create/track/status update, banners, coupons, admin stats) and frontend (Home trust bar, About story line, Products listing, Admin login -> dashboard) via the public preview URL. All critical flows working. No blockers.
passed: GET /api/settings returns business_name=Kiran Traders, phone=+91 9044057739, phone2=+91 9044097739, address includes '253/121, Below Jaiswal Dharamshala, Nehru Cross, Nadan Mahal Road, Lucknow'
GET /api/categories returns 7 seeded categories in expected order (Thermocol Plates, Thermocol Bowls, Carry Bags, Plastic Bags, Disposable Glasses, Packaging Materials, Luggage Bags)
GET /api/products returns paginated response with items (13 products), each with id/name/price/moq/stock/image; GET /api/products/{id} returns full detail (200)
POST /api/auth/login with admin@kirantraders.com/Admin@123 returns JWT token; GET /api/auth/me returns admin user (200)
POST /api/orders (COD) creates order KT... with items+address+payment_method; POST /api/orders/track with order_id+mobile returns order; PUT /api/orders/{id}/status transitions to 'confirmed' (200)
GET /api/orders (admin) returns paginated orders; GET /api/admin/stats returns revenue/order counts/sales_chart
GET /api/banners and GET /api/coupons return seeded data

Home page: header shows 'Kiran Traders · Since 2004 · Lucknow', top strip shows +91 9044057739, and trust bar contains all 4 items exactly: '10K+ Orders / Fulfilled across UP', 'Fast Delivery / Doorstep in Lucknow', 'Fast Dispatch / Same-day for local orders', '5.0 Rating / Trusted by our buyers'
About page contains exact story line about Nadan Mahal Road / UP
Products page loads with Thermocol/Carry Bags categories and product cards (Cabin Trolley Bag, etc.)

Admin login at /admin/login with admin@kirantraders.com/Admin@123 navigates to /admin/dashboard showing Revenue ₹1,599, Orders 1, Products 13, sidebar (Orders/Products/Categories/Coupons/Banners/Settings)
action_items: Minor: Problem statement referenced endpoints /api/login and /api/order (singular). Actual routes are /api/auth/login, /api/orders, /api/orders/track, PUT /api/orders/{id}/status. If any frontend client still hits old paths, update it — but current frontend flows work end-to-end so likely already aligned.
Login response uses key 'token' (not 'access_token'). Ensure any docs/tests reference the correct field.

not_tested: Products filter by category via UI clicks
Admin CRUD for products/categories/banners via UI
